touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Sage Richter, VP of Sales at DeltaFlow. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message sent highlighting onboarding automation use case for fintech companies. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Sage Richter. Call went to voicemail, left brief message about streamlining customer onboarding processes.

Brief initial conversation with Sage. Confirmed current onboarding process is manual and time-consuming. Sage expressed interest in learning more about automation capabilities. Scheduled follow-up qualification call.

questions_asked.question: What does your current customer onboarding process look like?
questions_asked.answer: It's mostly manual right now. Our team spends a lot of time on repetitive tasks getting new clients set up in our system.

next_steps: Send overview email with relevant case studies
Schedule 30-minute qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent confirmation email with meeting link for qualification call and attached case study on fintech onboarding automation. Sage responded confirming attendance and asking about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: How long does a typical implementation take?
questions_asked.answer: For a team your size, typically 2-3 weeks from kickoff to full deployment.

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Sage covered current pain points and business impact. DeltaFlow onboards 15-20 new clients per month with 3-day average setup time. Sage owns the sales operations process and has budget authority for tools under $10K. Interested in unlimited automation tier for scalability.

questions_asked.question: How many new customers are you onboarding each month?
questions_asked.answer: We're averaging 15-20 new clients monthly, and that number is growing.

questions_asked.question: What's your current timeline from contract signing to customer going live?
questions_asked.answer: Right now it takes about 3 days on average, but we'd like to get that down to same-day.

questions_asked.question: Can your system integrate with our existing CRM and banking verification APIs?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have pre-built connectors for major CRMs and can work with custom APIs through our integration framework.

touches.ai_summary: Sent calendar invite for technical evaluation session and shared technical integration guide. Sage confirmed and requested that demo focus on workflow automation for document collection and identity verification.

questions_asked.question: Can we see specifically how you handle automated document collection and ID verification workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, we'll focus the demo on those exact use cases.

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive technical evaluation with Sage walking through onboarding automation workflows. Demonstrated document collection, automated ID verification, and CRM integration. Sage was engaged and asked detailed questions about customization and reporting. Only Sage attended; no other stakeholders present despite invitation to technical team.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the workflow stages to match our specific compliance requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the workflow builder allows full customization of stages, approval gates, and compliance checkpoints.

questions_asked.question: Who else on your team should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: I'm driving this from the sales ops side. I'll loop in my team once we're further along.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting do you provide on onboarding metrics?
questions_asked.answer: We provide real-time dashboards showing time-to-activation, bottleneck identification, and completion rates by workflow stage.

next_steps: Send proposal for 8 seats with unlimited automation tier

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Sage covering $7,000/year pricing for 8 seats with unlimited automation. Sage seemed positive about capabilities but hesitant about moving forward without leadership approval. Asked about payment terms and contract flexibility.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer monthly payment options instead of annual?
questions_asked.answer: Our standard terms are annual, but we can discuss quarterly payments for an additional 5% on the total.

questions_asked.question: Should we include your VP of Operations or CFO in the next conversation about budget approval?
questions_asked.answer: I think we're okay to proceed. I have authority for this range, but let me confirm internally.

objections: Need to verify budget approval process with finance
next_steps: Sage to confirm budget authority by end of week
Follow-up call to address any remaining questions

touches.ai_summary: Second proposal call to address Sage's internal questions. Discussed ROI calculations showing 120 hours saved per month. Sage confirmed budget is available but mentioned needing to finalize before end of quarter. Still only engaging with Sage; no executive sponsor involvement visible.

questions_asked.question: Can you break down the ROI calculation in more detail?
questions_asked.answer: Based on your 18 monthly onboardings and reducing setup time from 3 days to 4 hours, you're saving about 120 team hours monthly, worth roughly $6K at your team's loaded cost.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the end-of-quarter timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We have quarterly planning coming up and I want to show this efficiency gain in our next business review.

next_steps: Send updated proposal with quarterly payment option
Schedule final pricing call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Pricing and terms negotiation call. Sage requested 10% discount to fit within allocated budget. Discussed contract terms and implementation timeline. Agreed to 5% discount with annual commitment. Sage mentioned needing a few days to finalize paperwork.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing? We have $6,500 allocated for this initiative.
questions_asked.answer: I can offer 5% off with an annual commitment, bringing it to $6,650. That's the best I can do while including unlimited automation.

questions_asked.question: When would you want to start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within two weeks of signing so we can have it running before month-end.

objections: Budget allocated is $6,500, asking for additional discount
next_steps: Sage to review and return signed agreement by Friday

touches.ai_summary: Sent updated contract reflecting $6,650 annual pricing with 5% discount and unlimited automation tier for 8 seats. Included implementation timeline and onboarding plan. Sage acknowledged receipt and confirmed review in progress with legal.
